name: llm-vault
description: OpenClaw plugin scaffold for safe redacted llm-vault access.

repoRoot.description: Absolute path to the llm-vault checkout. Defaults to this plugin checkout root.

vaultAgentPath.description: Path to vault-agent. Relative paths resolve from repoRoot and default to ./vault-agent.

timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout passed to vault-agent and enforced by the plugin wrapper.
